summary: Comprehensive testing of /celebrate-soul page (CelebratePageNew.jsx). All major features are working including: hero with Mojo's pet photo, Soul 89% chip, soul chips, category strip with 7+ categories, all 8 soul pillar cards with correct glow states, Mira Ask Bar below pillars that opens Mira AI widget, Birthday Box section with all item chips, correct CTA navigations, Concierge section with dark background and gold button, drawer with two tabs (Celebrate/Personalised) showing real products. One bug found in Mira quote for Food pillar showing [object Object].

ui_bugs.issue: Food pillar Mira quote shows '[object Object]' - pet.favorites?.[0] is an object not a string. Text shows: 'We know Mojo loves [object Object] and can't have nothing specific'
ui_bugs.fix: In SOUL_PILLARS[0].miraQuote, change `${pet.favorites?.[0] || 'treats'}` to `${(typeof pet.favorites?.[0] === 'string' ? pet.favorites[0] : pet.favorites?.[0]?.name || pet.favorites?.[0]?.value || 'treats')}`

issues: Strip shows 'Pupcakes & Dognuts' but spec requirement says 'Pupcakes' - minor name discrepancy

Drawer shows 'Chicken Delight Doggo Cake' for Mojo who has chicken allergy - no allergen filtering in CelebrateConcierge drawer (unlike SoulPillarExpanded which filters allergens). Consider showing allergy warning or filtering in drawer too

hero_section.mira_quote_card: PASS - Mira quote card visible with context

mira_ask_bar.click_opens_mira: PASS - Clicking input opens Mira AI widget immediately
mira_ask_bar.mira_widget_context: PASS - Mira opens with 'Tell me how to celebrate Mojo' context

concierge_section.service_tags: PASS - Birthday Cakes, Pawty Hampers, Photoshoots, Birthday Box, Custom Merch, Memory Books

concierge_drawer.opens_on_click: PASS - Drawer opens from bottom when button clicked
concierge_drawer.celebrate_tab: PASS - 'Celebrate' tab present and active by default
concierge_drawer.celebrate_products: PASS - Shows real cakes: Kawaii Woofy Cake, Cheeky Boney, Dog Birthday Cake Hamper, Breed Birthday Cake Hamper, Tailored Peanut Butter Cake, Chicken Delight Doggo Cake, etc.
concierge_drawer.doggy_bakery_label: PASS - 'BIRTHDAY CAKES & TREATS — FROM THE DOGGY BAKERY' label visible
concierge_drawer.personalised_bundles: PASS - Shows bundles: Banana & Oats Crunch, Cheesy Chicken Explosion, First Birthday Special, Premium Bark-day Bash, Pawty Essentials, etc.

pillar_expansion.food_pillar_expands: PASS - Click expands Food & Flavour with purple border
pillar_expansion.product_tabs_visible: PASS - Birthday Cakes, Breed Cakes, Pupcakes, Desi Treats tabs visible
pillar_expansion.products_loaded: PASS - Real products loaded with prices and 'For Mojo' tags
pillar_expansion.mira_quote_in_expansion: BUG - Shows '[object Object]' instead of pet's favorite
pillar_expansion.allergen_warning: PASS - Allergy filtering works in expanded pillar

mobile_view.hero_stacked_layout: PASS - Hero shows stacked layout (avatar centered, content below) on mobile
mobile_view.soul_chips_visible: PASS - All soul chips visible on mobile
mobile_view.mobile_bottom_nav: PASS - Mobile nav bar unchanged with HOME, INBOX, ORDERS, MY PET

celebration_wall.section_present: PASS - Celebration wall with pet photos visible (Euro, Simba, Zippy cards)

action_items: FIX BUG: SoulCelebrationPillars.jsx Food pillar miraQuote - pet.favorites?.[0] renders as [object Object]. Fix: extract string from object using .name or .value property before interpolating in template literal
CONSIDER: Add allergen filtering or warning banner to CelebrateConcierge drawer (Celebrate tab currently shows chicken products for Mojo who is allergic to chicken)
critical_code_review_comments: SoulCelebrationPillars.jsx line 31: miraQuote uses `${pet.favorites?.[0]}` which renders as '[object Object]' when favorites is an array of objects. Should use: `${typeof pet.favorites?.[0] === 'string' ? pet.favorites[0] : pet.favorites?.[0]?.name || 'treats'}`

CelebrateConcierge.jsx: Drawer Celebrate tab fetches cakes without allergen filtering - unlike SoulPillarExpanded.jsx which correctly filters. Consider adding allergy-safe notice or filtering to the drawer

success_rate.frontend: 95% (30/32 test cases pass, 1 bug found in Mira quote, 1 design note)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The /celebrate-soul page (CelebratePageNew.jsx) is fully implemented and 95% working. All major features work: hero with pet photo and soul chips, category strip, 8 soul pillars with correct glow states, Mira Ask Bar that opens Mira widget, Birthday Box with items, CTAs navigating correctly, dark concierge section with gold button, drawer with Celebrate/Personalised tabs showing real products. One bug: Food pillar expanded view Mira quote shows '[object Object]' instead of pet's favorite food. Fix needed in SoulCelebrationPillars.jsx line 31 miraQuote function.

object_object_in_mira_quote.root_cause: The template literal `${pet.favorites?.[0]}` interpolates a JavaScript object directly into a string, resulting in '[object Object]'. The pet.favorites array contains objects (e.g. {name: 'salmon', ...}) not plain strings.
object_object_in_mira_quote.reproduction: Expand Food & Flavour pillar card on /celebrate-soul page. The Mira quote section shows: "We know Mojo loves [object Object] and can't have nothing specific."
object_object_in_mira_quote.fix: Change `${pet.favorites?.[0] || 'treats'}` to `${(typeof pet.favorites?.[0] === 'string' ? pet.favorites[0] : pet.favorites?.[0]?.name || pet.favorites?.[0]?.value || 'treats')}`
